name: daily-fresh fetch: once first-use-of-day refresh runs, marker file in .claude-tdd-pro/last-day-refresh.txt prevents a second refresh on same calendar day
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --check-first-use-of-day --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" >/dev/null 2>&1 && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --check-first-use-of-day --now 2026-05-13T18:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" 2>out.txt && grep "already refreshed today" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
